FlowForm Studio PRO v0.1.0 is the first public portfolio release of the
browser-first studio for visual forms and approval workflows.

## Highlights

- Visual drag-and-drop form builder with bounded undo and redo
- Typed conditional workflow editor with a second approval above EUR 5,000
- Dynamic multi-step form runtime with validation and signature input
- Contextual clarification, resubmission, and staged approval flow
- Role simulation, comments, and an immutable audit timeline
- React, TypeScript, NestJS, Socket.IO, Zod, Prisma, and an installable PWA

## Runtime

FlowForm Studio runs in the browser and can be installed as a Progressive Web
App. This release does not contain separate Windows or macOS binaries.

Recruiter sandboxes are protected and expire after 24 hours. The current demo
keeps them in API memory. The tenant-ready PostgreSQL model and deployment
topology are included as the foundation for durable persistence.
